author: Adam Tommasi
description: Turn Markdown recipe notes into an interactive cookbook with meal planning, grocery lists, timers, cook history, and more. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Arcane Tech
manifest.description: Plan meals, generate grocery lists, and view recipe notes as interactive cards.
manifest.name: Recipe Box

name: Recipe Box

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## NEW! 🔗 Share any recipe with a link

You can now share a single recipe as a clean, public web page, no Obsidian required on the other end. Perfect for the "wait, send me that recipe!" moment after dinner.

**How it works:** open any recipe, hit Share, and you'll get a link back in seconds. Anyone with the link can view the recipe (ingredients, instructions, times, nutrition, and the photo), styled to match Recipe Box's own look, light or dark depending on their system. More info in the documentation here: https://recipebox-docs.vercel.app/features/sharing-a-recipe/
Built with a few things in mind:

Links expire. You choose 7, 30, or 90 days at share time, nothing lives forever by default.
You're in control. Unshare anytime, and re-sharing just gets you a fresh link.
Your vault stays private. Only the recipe itself goes out, ingredients, instructions, times, nutrition, and the photo. Personal notes, tags, and everything else in your vault never leave it.
Photo credit where it's due. If a recipe's photo originally came from another site, the shared page says so.

This is a first version, sharing one recipe at a time. Sharing whole collections isn't part of this release, but it's on the radar depending on how this first version lands.
For the curious: the backend that powers sharing ([recipebox-share-worker](https://github.com/AdamArcane/recipebox-share-worker)) is open source under MIT. It's not officially supported for self-hosting, but if you want to see exactly what happens to a shared recipe's data, or run your own instance, it's all there.

### Changelog

* add support for optional notes section in recipe notes ([ba447f6](https://github.com/AdamArcane/obsidian-recipebox/commit/ba447f6bdf42c2ccebfdb039c5d02c84e95ef4de))
* redesigned the import recipe preview ([831786e](https://github.com/AdamArcane/obsidian-recipebox/commit/831786e05e28d2ff76b0db52a31e9f7c12e8d409))
* add recipe sharing functionality ([3c1c416](https://github.com/AdamArcane/obsidian-recipebox/commit/3c1c416accb81e0d9ea936f8fc936ae34fd31394))
* add release scripts for minor and major version bumps ([965f75d](https://github.com/AdamArcane/obsidian-recipebox/commit/965f75da7c7be7df9271e23231b14febe5f382c6))
* better handle missing properties when importing recipes. ([63542ae](https://github.com/AdamArcane/obsidian-recipebox/commit/63542aea64118b350e19584a99e5f89c412bc572))
* enhance privacy so that extra recipe note data cannot be shared inadvertantly ([f8a99b7](https://github.com/AdamArcane/obsidian-recipebox/commit/f8a99b7a2f5a9088d6f729ea8e8bf199f327893f))
* scope recipe detection to configurable folders by default ([6e3ac09](https://github.com/AdamArcane/obsidian-recipebox/commit/6e3ac093df583bf9c67da0888703daf542ca2f30))
* Show more useful error message when import from URL fails ([0abe6f1](https://github.com/AdamArcane/obsidian-recipebox/commit/0abe6f1e86adc6103f961a54e319c85fa670f212))
* tweaks to the share modal and styles of the recipe output when sharing ([18d250a](https://github.com/AdamArcane/obsidian-recipebox/commit/18d250a8ca7ad4cd4599a56ebdfbdd4e4aaf0481))

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/AdamArcane/obsidian-recipebox/compare/0.1.6...0.1.7

releases.description:
## [0.1.5](https://github.com/AdamArcane/obsidian-recipebox/compare/0.1.5-beta.3...0.1.5) (2026-07-09)

### Features
* Introduced a new desktop recipe layout option ("two-column") alongside the existing "classic"  single column layout.
* Implemented a split ratio feature for the two-column layout, allowing users to adjust the width of the columns.
* Updated settings to include options for selecting the desktop recipe layout and resetting the split ratio to default.
* Added a new modal for displaying trailing sections of the recipe, improving user interaction with additional content.
* add option to use the first image in the recipe note as the hero image if nothing found in the frontmatter property. ([96f5464](https://github.com/AdamArcane/obsidian-recipebox/commit/96f54648d740e1abe4d13b763c1917323a85f6e2))
* easily schedule suggested recipes across days to the meal plan using the meal suggester, which is now a dedicated button in the meal plan view. ([961bd05](https://github.com/AdamArcane/obsidian-recipebox/commit/961bd054d73090dcb06dc410f62356cac5484c23))
